note: Placeholder reviews — replace with real client reviews (Treatwell / Google) before launch marketing.

reviews.text: My powder brows healed beautifully — so natural that my hairdresser didn't believe they were tattooed. Anastasia talked me through every step.
reviews.author: S. M.

reviews.text: The carbon facial left my skin glowing for weeks. The clinic is spotless and Anastasia makes you feel completely at ease.
reviews.author: L. K.

reviews.text: I was nervous about lip blush but the colour match is perfect — just a better version of my own lips. Worth every penny.
reviews.author: H. T.

reviews.text: After a course of IPL my skin is the clearest it has been in years. Honest advice, no upselling, real results.
reviews.author: R. B.

reviews.text: Brow lamination and tint — quick, painless and my brows have never looked this good. Already booked my next visit.
reviews.author: E. W.

reviews.text: The HIFU facelift genuinely turned back the clock. Subtle, gradual and completely natural-looking. I couldn't recommend AD Beauty more.
reviews.author: J. P.
